```java
package com.example.service;

import ognl.DefaultMemberAccess;
import ognl.Ognl;
import ognl.OgnlContext;
import ognl.OgnlException;

public class ReportService {

    /**
     * Retrieves a field value from the data source based on an OGNL expression.
```

```java
package com.example.service;

import ognl.Ognl;
import ognl.OgnlException;

import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;

public class ReportService {

    // Cache for compiled OGNL expressions
    private static final ConcurrentHashMap expressionCache = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();

    /**
     * Retrieves field value from the data source based on an OGNL expression.
     * @param expression OGNL expression string
     * @param dataRoot data source object
     * @return result of the expression evaluation
     * @throws OgnlException thrown when OGNL expression parsing or execution fails
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if expression or dataRoot is null
     */
    public Object getReportFieldValue(String expression, Object dataRoot) throws OgnlException {
        if (expression == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Expression must not be null");
        }
        if (dataRoot == null) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("DataRoot must not be null");
        }

        Object compiledExpression = expressionCache.get(expression);
        if (compiledExpression == null) {
            try {
                // Parse and compile the expression
                Object newExpression = Ognl.parseExpression(expression);
                // Use thread-safe putIfAbsent to handle race conditions
                Object existingExpression = expressionCache.putIfAbsent(expression, newExpression);
                compiledExpression = (existingExpression != null) ? existingExpression : newExpression;
            } catch (OgnlException e) {
                // Don't cache invalid expressions - they'll be reported every time
                throw e;
            }
        }
        return Ognl.getValue(compiledExpression, dataRoot);
    }
}
```

```xml
package com.example.service;

import ognl.*;
import org.ognl.runtime.SecurityMemberAccess;

public class ReportService {

    public Object getReportFieldValue(String expression, Object dataRoot) throws OgnlException {
        // Create a secure member access configuration with strict restrictions
        SecurityMemberAccess memberAccess = new SecurityMemberAccess(true);
        memberAccess.setAllowConstant(true); // Allow constants (e.g., literals in expressions)
        
        // Disable all dangerous operations
        memberAccess.setMethodAccess(false); // Disable method execution
        memberAccess.setFieldAccess(false); // Disable field access
        memberAccess.setStaticFieldAccess(false); // Disable static field access
        memberAccess.setStaticMethodAccess(false); // Disable static method access
        memberAccess.setConstructorAccess(false); // Disable constructor access
        memberAccess.setClassResolver(null); // Disable dynamic class loading
        
        // Initialize context with safe member access and dataRoot as root
        OgnlContext context = (OgnlContext) Ognl.createDefaultContext(
            dataRoot, 
            new DefaultClassResolver(), 
            new DefaultTypeConverter(), 
            memberAccess
        );

        // Parse and safely evaluate the expression
        Object expressionRoot = Ognl.parseExpression(expression);
        return Ognl.getValue(expressionRoot, context, dataRoot);
    }
}
</fixed_code>
```

```xml
<report_service>
public class ReportService
{
    private readonly IReportRepository _reportRepository;
    private readonly IReportGenerator _reportGenerator;
    private readonly ILogger<ReportService> _logger;
    private readonly IOptions<ReportSettings> _settings;

    public ReportService(
        IReportRepository reportRepository,
        IReportGenerator reportGenerator,
        ILogger<ReportService> logger,
        IOptions<ReportSettings> settings)
    {
        _reportRepository = reportRepository ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(reportRepository));
        _reportGenerator = reportGenerator ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(reportGenerator));
        _logger = logger ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(logger));
        _settings = settings ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(settings));
    }

    public async Task<ReportResult> GenerateReportAsync(ReportRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        try
        {
            _logger.LogInformation("Starting report generation for type {ReportType}", request.ReportType);

            var reportData = await _reportRepository.GetReportDataAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            
            var report = await _reportGenerator.GenerateAsync(reportData, request.Format, cancellationToken);

            var result = new ReportResult
            {
                Content = report.Content,
                ContentType = report.ContentType,
                FileName = $"{request.ReportName}_{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.{request.Format}",
                GeneratedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
            };

            _logger.LogInformation("Report {ReportName} generated successfully", request.ReportName);
            return result;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _logger.LogError(ex, "Error generating report {ReportName}", request.ReportName);
            throw;
        }
    }

    public async Task<ReportDto> GetReportStatusAsync(string reportId, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var report = await _reportRepository.GetByIdAsync(reportId, cancellationToken);
        if (report == null)
        {
            _logger.LogWarning("Report with ID {ReportId} not found", reportId);
            throw new ReportNotFoundException(reportId);
        }

        return new ReportDto
        {
            Id = report.Id,
            Status = report.Status,
            CreatedAt = report.CreatedAt,
            CompletedAt = report.CompletedAt,
            ErrorMessage = report.ErrorMessage
        };
    }

    public async Task<PagedResult<ReportListItemDto>> GetReportsAsync(ReportQuery query, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var reports = await _reportRepository.GetReportsAsync(query, cancellationToken);
        
        return new PagedResult<ReportListItemDto>
        {
            Items = reports.Items.Select(r => new ReportListItemDto
            {
                Id = r.Id,
                Name = r.Name,
                Type = r.Type,
                Status = r.Status,
                CreatedAt = r.CreatedAt
            }).ToList(),
            TotalCount = reports.TotalCount,
            Page = query.Page,
            PageSize = query.PageSize
        };
    }

    public async Task DeleteReportAsync(string reportId, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        _logger.LogInformation("Deleting report {ReportId}", reportId);
        await _reportRepository.DeleteAsync(reportId, cancellationToken);
        _logger.LogInformation("Report {ReportId} deleted successfully", reportId);
    }
}
</report_service>
```
